description_long: This kiosk features a large, rectangular digital touchscreen mounted on a sleek, metallic pedestal. The screen displays a login interface with fields for email ID and password, suggesting interactive functionality for users. The pedestal is angular and modern, with a sturdy, geometric base that provides stability. The kiosk's surface is smooth and reflective, with a gradient background on the display that transitions from blue to pink hues. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible buttons or physical controls aside from the touchscreen. The structure appears robust and is likely intended for public or semi-public urban environments such as lobbies, sidewalks, or transit stations.
description: A modern, metallic kiosk with a large interactive touchscreen and a sturdy, angular pedestal base. The display features a login interface and a smooth, reflective surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full touchscreen display with a login interface and the pedestal base directly beneath.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the thinness of the screen and the angular, metallic support structure.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the screen and the solid, geometric pedestal base.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again emphasizing the sleek support and the edge of the display.
attribute_signage_type: digital display integrated into the front screen, showing a login interface with user icon and text fields
attribute_roof_design: flat, rectangular screen surface with no overhangs or decorative elements
